response.step_by_step_log:

2. Extracted on-screen metadata: "Lyrics, Music: Amala" and "ダイダイダイダイダイキライ" (Song Title). 
3. Performed web search for: "Dai Dai Dai Kirai Amala lyrics Japanese and English". 
4. Verified lyrics and artist information using search results. 
5. Compiled metadata and lyrics into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a dramatic, choreographed 3D performance of the song "Daidaidaidaidaikirai" by Kiara and Anya, interspersed with short scenes of dialogue between the characters Anya, Kiara, and Watame in a study setting.

scenes.description: Kiara and Anya begin a choreographed performance of the song 'Daidaidaidaidaikirai'. On-screen text indicates: 'Lyrics, Music: Amala'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
全部 全部 アンタのせいだ
反吐が出るくらいにウザったいわ
何かに縋って諂って
期待したアタシが馬鹿だった
｢憎たらしい! ｣｢痛々しい! ｣
なんて、もう効かないわ
当然の報いに食らっちゃった
ヒトは鏡なんです
実のところ依存は両便なんです
シャットダウンしても付き纏う
己の弱さが不甲斐ない
全部 全部 アンタのせいだ
反吐が出るくらいに止まんないわ
いっそのこと切り離せた方が
楽なのに、な
だいたいアンタのことアタシ
ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
OMG情けない
もはやバイバイバイバイバイしたい
脳内も予測不能
ゆえに…
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's all, it's all your fault again!
You make me sick, I can't stand it anymore.
I was a fool to rely on you, to flatter you,
And to expect greatness from you.
'I hate you!' 'You're pathetic!'
None of it is heard, it's all in vain!
It's just the natural consequence, I've been cursed.
You're a mirror of my own weakness,
I'm so pathetic, I want to say bye-bye-bye-bye-bye
I want to say bye-bye-bye-bye-bye to you.
My mind is unpredictable, so...
